headline: Oppenheimer Initiates Coverage of EMCOR (EME) with Outperform
summary: EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE:EME) is one of the 10 Best Data Center Stocks with Huge Upside Potential. On May 28, 2026, Oppenheimer analyst Brent Thielman initiated coverage of EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE:EME) with an Outperform rating and a $1,100 price target. Thielman viewed EMCOR as one of the “higher quality” public infrastructure services companies, citing […]
